existing_features.title: Investigate and fix the loading issue preventing the application from loading properly. Check for infinite loading states, failed queries, or component mounting problems in ProductBrowse.tsx, SwipeableGallery.tsx, and related data-fetching hooks.
Review and optimize the useQueries hooks for product fetching to ensure queries are not stuck in pending states or causing re-render loops.
Verify the LoadingTimeout component is properly configured and triggers timeout alerts if backend queries exceed reasonable durations.
Check backend actor initialization in useActor.ts to ensure the actor is being created successfully and not causing frontend queries to hang.
